choices.description: All choice for Target Filter values
choices.name: c_All

decisions.name: Update_Audits_Delete_Audits_Set_Target_Plan_or_Save_Changes_To_Assets
decisions.label: Update Audits, Delete Audits, Set Target Plan or Save Changes To Assets?

decisions.name: Were_Achieved_Targets_Selected_For_Update
decisions.label: Were Achieved Targets Selected For Update?

Flow.description: Allows priviliged users to view Assets / Asset Target Audit records and filter based on status, outcome, year, and other criteria. Allows to filter for Assets with no open targets. Allows for setting and adjustment of targets.

formulas.name: f_AssetTableFormulaHeader
f_AssetTargetAuditStatusDefinitions
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Select_An_Outcome}, 'Achieved - LOI Other', 'Target closed by an Asset in Deal being LOId outside of the target year', 'Achieved - LOI', 'Target closed by an Asset in Deal being LOId within the target year', 'Achieved - No LOI', 'Target closed by a new Contract getting signed for the Asset. There is no related Deal in the system', 'Achieved - Contract Extended', 'Target closed by a Contract being extended', 'Target Cancelled', 'Either the target was manually readjusted, the Contract is Cancelled, the Contract is Expired / Terminated', 'Open', 'The Asset needs to be placed and has a Target Forecast date in the future', 'Open - Target Date Exceeded', 'The Asset needs to be placed and has a Target Forecast date in the past', '' )

formulas.name: f_AssetTargetSnapshotItemQuery

formulas.description: Based on the checkbox View Target Snashot return either a query to show Targets by selected year or show only Targets that are part of current snapshot
formulas.name: f_ChooseTargetQuery
f_DataFetcherAssetQueries
formulas.expression:
IF( {!View_Assets_Without_Any_Target},
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c, Likely_Outcome__c, pro_Marketing_Trading__c, pro_Impact_Type__c, leaseworks__RecordTypeDevName__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Lease_Status__c, leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c, pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c, pro_Target_Forecast_Date__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c " & "WHERE Id IN (" & TRIM({!varListOfIdsForAssetsWithoutTargetsQuery}) & ") " & "ORDER BY leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c ASC",
IF( ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year}),
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c, Likely_Outcome__c, pro_Marketing_Trading__c, pro_Impact_Type__c, leaseworks__RecordTypeDevName__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Lease_Status__c, leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c, pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c, pro_Target_Forecast_Date__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c " & "ORDER BY leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c ASC",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c, Likely_Outcome__c, pro_Marketing_Trading__c, pro_Impact_Type__c, leaseworks__RecordTypeDevName__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Lease_Status__c, leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c, pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c, pro_Target_Forecast_Date__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c " & "WHERE (pro_Target_Year__c = '" & {!Select_A_Year} & "' " & "OR pro_Most_Recent_Achieved_Target_Year__c = '" & {!Select_A_Year} & "') " & "ORDER BY leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c ASC" ) )

formulas.name: f_DataTable1AuditQuery
f_Datatable_1_Header
f_TargetRecordsFilteredBySelectedYear
formulas.expression: "SELECT Id, Name, pro_Target_Amount__c, pro_Forecast_Target_Count2__c, pro_Achieved_Target_Count__c FROM pro_Target__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year}) + 1) & "' ORDER BY pro_End_Date__c ASC"

formulas.name: f_TargetsAchievedQueryFilteredByYear
formulas.expression: "SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Progress__c IN ('Achieved - LOI','Achieved - LOI Other','Achieved - Contract Extended','Achieved - No LOI') AND pro_Target_Year__c = '" & {!Select_A_Year} & "'"

formulas.name: f_TargetSnapshotQuery

Flow.label: Screen - Target Management Console

recordLookups.name: Get_Asset_Target_Audit_Records_For_LOI_Lease_Extension
recordLookups.label: Get Asset Target Audit Records For LOI Lease Extension

fields.name: AchievedTargetValidationMessage
fields.fieldText:
⚠️

Update Not Allowed

One or more selected Asset Targets are marked as Achieved.

The Target Forecast cannot be updated for Asset Targets with an Achieved status.

Please select only Open Asset Targets and try again.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_WarningDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
⚠️

 You are about to delete the Asset Target Snapshot: {!Choose_Snapshot}


Once you click Delete Target Snapshot, this snapshot will be permanently deleted.

fields.name: WarningDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
⚠️

 You are about to delete the targets for {!Create_Removed_Target_Asset_NameCollection}


Once you click Delete Targets, these Targets will be permanently deleted.

fields.name: TargetPlanTotalsDisplay
fields.fieldText:
{!Select_A_Year} Totals

Run Rate: {!df_FetchRunRateTargetCount.aggQueryResult}

Roll Off: {!df_FetchRollOffTargetCount.aggQueryResult}

Achieved: {!df_FetchAchievedTargetCount.aggQueryResult}

fields.name: ViewSnapshotReport
fields.fieldText: View Report: {!Choose_Snapshot}

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: 1 AND 8 AND (2 OR 4) AND (3 OR 5) AND 6 AND 7

fields.name: TargetDeletionInformation
fields.fieldText:
You have selected Asset Target records for deletion.

Click the "Delete Target(s)" button at the foot of the data table to confirm the deletion.

value.stringValue: pro_Asset_Name__c:146, pro_Contract__c:180, pro_Progress__c:202, pro_LOId_Deal_Type__c:236, pro_Likely_Outcome__c:180, pro_Marketing_Trading__c:123, pro_Target_Forecast_Name__c:138, pro_Target_Reached__c:142, pro_Current_Lease_Expiry_Date__c:200
pro_Asset__c:311, pro_Contract__c:311, pro_Progress__c:311, pro_Likely_Outcome__c:311, pro_Marketing_Trading__c:311, pro_Target_Forecast__c:311, pro_Target_Reached__c:311, pro_Target_End_Date__c:311

Name:321, leaseworks__RecordTypeDevName__c:173, leaseworks__Status__c:252, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c:190, Likely_Outcome__c:173, pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c:189, pro_Marketing_Trading__c:169, pro_Target_Forecast_Date__c:172, leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c:435
leaseworks__RecordTypeDevName__c:Aircraft / Engine, pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c:Moved To Trading, pro_Target_Forecast_Date__c:Target Forecast
pro_Target_Amount__c:Run Rate Targets (Manual), pro_Forecast_Target_Count2__c:Roll Off Targets, pro_Achieved_Target_Count__c:Achieved Targets

fields.name: WarningMessage
fields.fieldText:
⚠️

 You are about to create a target snapshot: {!Select_A_Year} {!Select_An_Outcome} Target Snapshot: {!f_CurrentDateText}.


Once you click Confirm, any pre-existing snapshots named {!Select_A_Year} {!Select_An_Outcome} Target Snapshot: {!f_CurrentDateText} will be overwritten.

textTemplates.name: varDataFetcherQuery
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target__c FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c

transforms.name: Create_Asset_With_Open_Target_Id_Collection
transforms.label: Create Asset With Open Target Id Collection

transforms.name: Create_Collection_Of_Assets_Ids_LOI_Extended
transforms.label: Create Collection Of Assets Ids LOI Extended

transforms.name: Create_Collection_Of_User_Ids_Assigned_To_Permission_Set
transforms.label: Create Collection Of User Ids Assigned To Permission Set

transforms.name: Create_Progress_Status_Collection_For_Selected_Targets
transforms.label: Create Progress Status Collection For Selected Targets

transforms.name: Create_Removed_Target_Asset_NameCollection
transforms.label: Create Removed Target Asset Name Collection

value.stringValue: 'Open','Open - Target Date Exceeded','Achieved - LOI','Achieved - LOI Other','Achieved - Contract Extended','Achieved - No LOI'

variables.description: A collection of Assets that are neither Sold nor Consigned and have no open targets associated.
variables.name: varAssetsWithoutTargets

variables.description: Comma separated list of Ids for Assets without Targets formatted for reference in a flow resource building up a SOQL query
variables.name: varListOfIdsForAssetsWithoutTargetsQuery

value.stringValue: SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Likely_Outcome__c, pro_Target_Forecast__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Target_End_Date__c, pro_Asset_In_Deal__c, pro_Contract_Extended__c, pro_Asset_Name__c, pro_Progress__c, pro_Marketing_Trading__c, pro_Target_Reached__c , pro_LOId_Deal_Type__c, pro_Current_Lease_Expiry_Date__c, pro_Target_Forecast_Name__c
